milestones.name: Hello World
milestones.description: Your first 10 lines. Everyone starts somewhere.

milestones.name: Script Kiddie
milestones.description: 100 LoC. You can copy-paste with the best of them.

milestones.name: First Dollar
milestones.description: Your code made money. Don't spend it all in one place.

milestones.name: Side Project
milestones.description: 500 LoC. "I'll finish it this weekend."

milestones.name: Real Developer
milestones.description: 1,000 LoC. You now mass-produce bugs professionally.

milestones.name: First Hire
milestones.description: Someone is writing code for you. Is this what management feels like?

milestones.name: YC Application
milestones.description: 5,000 LoC. "We're disrupting code."

milestones.name: Open Source Fame
milestones.description: 25K LoC. 3 GitHub stars (one is your alt).

milestones.name: Big Tech
milestones.description: 100K LoC. You have a badge and imposter syndrome.

milestones.name: First AI Model
milestones.description: It writes code now. You're not sure if you should be proud or scared.

milestones.name: Model Collector
milestones.description: You own 5 AI models. Your GPU bill is a war crime.

milestones.name: Agent Mode
milestones.description: The models are talking to each other. This is fine.

milestones.name: ML Paper Published
milestones.description: 500K LoC. "We achieve state-of-the-art results."

milestones.name: Quality Crisis
milestones.description: Code quality dropped below 50%. The tech debt is sentient.

milestones.name: Quality Snob
milestones.description: Maintained 95%+ quality with 100K+ LoC. You monster.

milestones.name: Training Run Started
milestones.description: 2M LoC. The GPUs are warm.

milestones.name: Compute Lord
milestones.description: 1 billion FLOPS. Your electricity bill could fund a small country.

milestones.name: Emergent Behavior
milestones.description: 10M LoC. It said something you didn't expect.

milestones.name: The Flippening
milestones.description: AI writes more code than you ever did manually. You're optional now.

milestones.name: AGI Achieved
milestones.description: 100M LoC. "Hello, world." — it said back.
